[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100001000 2
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 001000000 1
4 000010000 1
5 100001000 2
6 001000000 1
7 000010010 2

01 10 000110000 2
12 21 000001010 2
23 32 100000011 3

67 76 101010000 3
70 07 001010000 2

02 20 000000000 a match 1 2
13 31 000000010 1
24 42 000000010 1
35 53 101000011 4
46 64 001010000 2

60 06 001010000 2
71 17 000011000 2

25 52 100001111 5
36 63 101000000 2
47 74 011010000 3
50 05 001000000 1 match 3 6
61 16 000010000 1 match 4
72 27 100001000 2 match 0 5

37 73 101000000 2
